events.name: China GDP (Y-o-Y) (Q4)
events.description: Measures the annual change in the value of all goods and services produced by the Chinese economy.

events.name: Canada CPI (Y-o-Y) (Dec)
events.description: Measures the inflation rate for Canadian consumers, influencing the Bank of Canada's interest rate path.

events.name: UK Unemployment Rate (Nov)
events.description: The percentage of the total British workforce that is unemployed and actively seeking employment.

events.name: UK Average Earnings Index (Nov)
events.description: Tracks the change in the price businesses pay for labor, a key indicator of wage-push inflation.

events.name: UK CPI (Y-o-Y) (Dec)
events.description: The primary measure of inflation in the UK, tracking price changes for a basket of consumer goods.

events.name: US Existing Home Sales (Dec)
events.description: Measures the number of previously owned residential buildings sold, reflecting the health of the US housing market.

events.name: US GDP (Q-o-Q) (Q4)
events.description: The 'Advance' estimate of the annualized growth rate of the US economy for the final quarter of 2025.

events.name: US Initial Jobless Claims
events.description: A weekly report of individuals filing for unemployment insurance, serving as a real-time labor market gauge.

events.name: BoJ Interest Rate Decision
events.description: The Bank of Japan announces its short-term interest rate target and updates its monetary policy stance.

events.name: UK Retail Sales (M-o-M) (Dec)
events.description: Measures the change in the total value of sales at the retail level, a proxy for consumer spending.
